Resource

Id: t4c8/t4c8_pipeline
Type: annotation_pipeline
Version: 0
Summary:
Description:
Labels:

Pipeline Documentation

preamble

Summary T4C8 Annotation Pipeline
Description Test pipeline with dummy resources
Input reference genome t4c8/t4c8_genome
Pipeline path:

Annotators

worst_effect
Type:

Worst effect across all transcripts.

source: worst_effect
gene_effects
Type:

<gene_1>:<effect_1>|... A gene can be repeated.

source: gene_effects
effect_details
Type:

Effect details for each affected transcript. Format: < transcript 1 >:<gene 1>:<effect 1>:<details 1>|...

source: effect_details
gene_list
Type: (Internal)

List of all genes

source: gene_list
Annotator type: effect_annotator

Annotator to identify the effect of the variant on protein coding.
